LandingPage.title: Outsight
LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Streamline your practice, track patient progress, and manage exercises with ease. Built specifically for the needs of CBT therapy.
LandingPage.feature1Desc: Easily add patients and track their journey through the CBT process.
LandingPage.feature2Desc: Assign thought records and behavioral experiments with a click.
LandingPage.feature3Desc: Your patient data is protected with industry-standard encryption.

PractitionerMyPatients.title: Outsight
PractitionerMyPatients.myPatientsDesc: Manage and track your patients' progress.
PractitionerMyPatients.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient name or email
PractitionerMyPatients.newEntries: {count, plural, one {# new entry} other {# new entries}}
PractitionerMyPatients.inviteCodeDesc: Share this code once with your patient. After it is used, it will stop working.
PractitionerMyPatients.inviteLinkDesc: Send this link to your patient. They can use it to create an account linked to your practice.
PractitionerMyPatients.noPatientsDesc: Click "Add Patient" to invite your first patient to the platform.

PractitionerQuestionnaires.title: Questionnaires
PractitionerQuestionnaires.description: Search the full questionnaire catalog, keep your active set organized, and pin the forms you use most.

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.description: Browse every active questionnaire available in the system, then add or pin what belongs in your day-to-day workflow.
explorer.emptyDescription: Try another search or clear one of the active filters.

quickAccess.title: Quick Access
quickAccess.description: These questionnaires appear first when assigning to a patient.
quickAccess.emptyDescription: Pin the questionnaires you prescribe often so they show first during assignment.

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: Archived custom questionnaires stay readable and restorable, but no longer appear during patient assignment.
archived.emptyDescription: Archive a custom questionnaire when you want to stop assigning it without deleting its history.

preview.quickAccessSuccess: This questionnaire is now pinned to quick access.
preview.removeQuickAccessSuccess: This questionnaire was removed from quick access.
preview.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes the template and all related prescriptions, responses, and history. This cannot be undone.
preview.deleteSuccess: The template and its related data were permanently deleted.
preview.archiveSuccess: The template was kept and removed from active use.

PatientHome.title: Outsight
PatientHome.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Outsight. Your practitioner has added you to their practice. This is where you'll see your progress and exercises soon.
PatientHome.gettingStartedQuote: "The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step."
PatientHome.step1: Wait for your therapist to assign your first exercise.

history.title: Session History
history.description: Track completed meetings, keep a clean running log, and come back to previous session notes before the next appointment.
history.emptyDescription: Start documenting your work with this patient after each meeting so you can see the full treatment rhythm in one place.
history.sessionTitlePlaceholder: Optional short title for this session
history.reviewPlaceholder: Summarize what you covered, progress you noticed, and what to revisit next time.

validation.reviewRequired: Please add a session review before saving.
validation.invalidDate: Please select a valid session date.

questionnaires.assignSuccess: The questionnaire is now active for this patient.
questionnaires.assignRestoredSuccess: An archived prescription for this template was restored and reactivated.
questionnaires.assignAlreadyActiveError: This patient already has an active questionnaire for that template.
questionnaires.activeDescription: These prescriptions are currently active and may generate new tasks for the patient.
questionnaires.archivedDescription: These prescriptions are retired from active use but remain available for review.
questionnaires.noScoredResponses: Scored responses will appear here once the patient completes scoreable questionnaires.
questionnaires.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes the prescription and all related patient data for it, including pending tasks and saved responses. This cannot be undone.
questionnaires.deleteConfirmTitleWithHistory: Delete this prescription and all of its history?
questionnaires.deleteConfirmDescriptionWithHistory: This prescription has {count} past responses. Deleting it will permanently remove the prescription and all of those answers from this patient record. We recommend archiving instead if you want to keep the history.
questionnaires.archiveSuccess: The prescription was kept and removed from active use.
questionnaires.deleteSuccess: The prescription and its related data were permanently deleted.

assignModal.title: Assign Questionnaire
assignModal.alreadyActive: This questionnaire is already active for this patient.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

CreateTemplate.title: Create Questionnaire Template
CreateTemplate.description: Design a new questionnaire to assign to your patients.
CreateTemplate.editDescription: Update the copied or custom questionnaire and keep it ready for your clinic.
CreateTemplate.duplicateName: A template with this name already exists in your clinic.
CreateTemplate.invalidTemplate: This template could not be opened.
CreateTemplate.invalidTemplateDescription: It may not exist anymore or you may not have access to it.
CreateTemplate.questionsEmpty: Start with a title, then add the questions your template should include.

shared.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: System Template Dashboard
login.description: Use the shared password to manage system questionnaire templates and tagging.

dashboard.title: Manage system templates
dashboard.description: Upload JSON templates, curate tags, and maintain the shared library practitioners can browse.
dashboard.uploadDescription: Upload one JSON template object or an array of templates. Selected tags are merged into every uploaded template.
dashboard.uploadTags: Tags to merge into this upload
dashboard.libraryDescription: Edit, archive, or delete the templates that appear in the practitioner explorer.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Adjust the search or tag filters, or import a new JSON file.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete this system template? This cannot be undone.

playground.title: Questionnaire visualization lab
playground.description: Compare layouts for questionnaires that reuse the same answer set and see which version still feels good on mobile.
playground.optionCount: {count, plural, one {# shared answer} other {# shared answers}}
playground.mobileNote: Each layout collapses differently on small screens.
playground.uniqueAnswerSet: This question uses a unique answer set.
playground.question: Question {index}

editor.title: Edit system template
editor.description: Update the shared template content, tags, and question structure directly.

creator.title: Create system template
creator.description: Compose a new shared template directly in the admin dashboard without uploading a file.

errors.duplicateTitle: A system template with this name already exists.
